# services.radicle

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.radicle`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.radicle.node.args` | `string` | Additional command line arguments to pass when executing `radicle-node`. |
| `services.radicle.node.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Radicle Node. |
| `services.radicle.node.environment` | `attribute set of (null or string or absolute path or package)` | Environment to set when executing `radicle-node`. |
| `services.radicle.node.lazy.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable a proxy service to lazily start and stop Radicle Node on demand. |
| `services.radicle.node.lazy.exitIdleTime` | `string` | The idle time after which no interaction with Radicle Node via the `rad` CLI should be stopped, in a format that {manpage}`systemd-socket-proxyd(8)` understands for its `--exit-idle-time` argument. |
| `services.radicle.node.package` | `package` | The radicle-node package to use. |
